Plaintiff'S Motion To Exclude Defendant'S Retained Supplemental Expert Witnesses Elaine Serina And James Cantrell From Testifying At Trial
Off Calendar Aug-10-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Anna Mezhebovskaya, Esq., Arias Sanguinetti Wang & Torrijos LLP, (510) 629-4877, for Plaintiff.

John D. Hourihan, Esq., LAW OFFICES OF SCOTT C STRATMAN, (510) 457-3440, for Defendant.

RE: PLAINTIFF ASHISH TALWAR's Motion To Exclude Defendant's Retained Supplemental Expert Witnesses Elaine Serina And James Cantrell From Testifying At Trial.

Defendants stipulate to the matter being decided by the Pro Tem Judge. The Pro Tem Judge and Counsel for Defendants (all appearing remotely) authorize the Clerk to sign the Formal Stipulation on their behalf.

Ruling - ARGUED. At the conclusion of argument, the motion is denied without prejudice as the Discovery court lacks jurisdiction.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)

DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is DENIED. Triable issues of fact exist in this action. See Defendant's Response to Plaintiff's Separate Statement 17, 20-26.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b) and in accordance with CCP Section 437c(g). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
